title: Supplementary material to the publication "Pooled-sample analysis strategies for COVID-19 mass testing: a simulation study" in the WHO Bulletin
author: Andreas Deckert

description:

 Table S2: COVID-19 two-step ‘routine high-throughput approach’: selected simulation results
